message:
chore(ci): bump GH Actions versions

- actions/checkout v4 -> v6
- astral-sh/setup-uv v5 -> v7
- actions/upload-artifact v4 -> v7
- docker/setup-buildx-action v3 -> v4
- docker/build-push-action v6 -> v7
- docker/setup-qemu-action v3 -> v4
- docker/login-action v3 -> v4
- docker/metadata-action v5 -> v6
- peter-evans/repository-dispatch v3 -> v4

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,10 +22,10 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Set up uv
-        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
         with:
           enable-cache: true
           cache-dependency-glob: "uv.lock"
@@ -47,10 +47,10 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Set up uv
-        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
         with:
           enable-cache: true
           cache-dependency-glob: "uv.lock"
@@ -70,10 +70,10 @@ jobs:
     needs: [lint, typecheck]
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Set up uv
-        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
         with:
           enable-cache: true
           cache-dependency-glob: "uv.lock"
@@ -103,7 +103,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Upload test results
         if: always()
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
         with:
           name: pytest-results
           path: pytest-results.xml
@@ -115,10 +115,10 @@ jobs:
     needs: [lint, typecheck]
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Set up uv
-        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
         with:
           enable-cache: true
           cache-dependency-glob: "uv.lock"
@@ -149,7 +149,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Upload test results
         if: always()
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
         with:
           name: playwright-results
           path: playwright-results.xml
@@ -161,13 +161,13 @@ jobs:
     needs: [lint, typecheck]
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Set up Docker Buildx
-        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
+        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v4
 
       - name: Build Docker image
-        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
+        uses: docker/build-push-action@v7
         with:
           context: .
           push: false

@@ -29,10 +29,10 @@ jobs:
       actions: write
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Set up uv
-        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
         with:
           enable-cache: true
           cache-dependency-glob: "uv.lock"
@@ -104,15 +104,15 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Upload artifacts
         if: always()
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
         with:
           name: nightly-smoke-${{ steps.dates.outputs.today }}
           path: benchmarks/production/${{ steps.dates.outputs.today }}
           retention-days: 30
 
       - name: Upload smoke logs
         if: failure()
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
         with:
           name: smoke-logs-${{ steps.dates.outputs.today }}
           path: |

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ jobs:
     if: github.event_name == 'push'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           fetch-depth: 1
 
@@ -55,7 +55,7 @@ jobs:
           echo "Computed SHA256: $SHA256"
 
       - name: Notify ACFS
-        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
+        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v4
         with:
           token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
           repository: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
@@ -82,7 +82,7 @@ jobs:
     if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Install shellcheck
         run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y shellcheck

@@ -24,26 +24,26 @@ jobs:
       packages: write
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           ref: ${{ inputs.tag || github.ref }}
 
       - name: Set up QEMU
-        uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v3
+        uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v4
 
       - name: Set up Docker Buildx
-        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
+        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v4
 
       - name: Log in to Container Registry
-        uses: docker/login-action@v3
+        uses: docker/login-action@v4
         with:
           registry: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}
           username: ${{ github.actor }}
           password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
 
       - name: Extract metadata for Docker
         id: meta
-        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
+        uses: docker/metadata-action@v6
         with:
           images: ${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}
           tags: |
@@ -54,7 +54,7 @@ jobs:
             type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == format('refs/tags/{0}', inputs.tag) || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') }}
 
       - name: Build and push Docker image
-        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
+        uses: docker/build-push-action@v7
         with:
           context: .
           platforms: linux/amd64,linux/arm64
@@ -72,7 +72,7 @@ jobs:
       contents: write
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           ref: ${{ inputs.tag || github.ref }}
           fetch-depth: 0
